blended.narrative: Boyne Highlands is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 31 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 303 ft. Looking ahead, 39 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 16" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
